The Problem

You are losing sales because of missed messages and slow follow-ups

That leads to...

01

Lost Revenue

Potential customers lose interest and buy from competitors who respond faster. Every unanswered message is money left on the table.

02

Missed Sales Opportunities

New leads come in every day, but delayed responses cause qualified prospects to go cold. Speed wins in today's market.

03

Manual Follow-Ups

Your team spends hours chasing leads, sending reminders, and answering the same questions instead of closing more sales.

AI Features

What Chat Pundit Does

From customer inquiries to completed orders — Chat Pundit helps you sell, support, and scale.

🖼️

Image Recognition

Customers can send a product photo, and Chat Pundit instantly identifies the item and shares pricing, availability, and details.

🌐

Multi-Language Conversations

Engages customers naturally in Bangla, English, Banglish, and other languages — exactly the way your customers speak.

🚨

Complaint Handling

Automatically flags complaints and urgent issues so your team can take action quickly before a problem escalates.

📥

Unified Inbox

Bring all customer conversations from Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, website chat, and SMS into one powerful place.

📦

Order Automation

Collect orders, update statuses, and manage customer requests without manual data entry — fully automated end to end.

🤖

AI-Powered Replies

Answers questions, recommends products, and responds instantly to customers around the clock — like your best sales rep, always on.

So you can focus on scaling revenue — like a sales rep that works around the clock.

See Chat Pundit in Action
Getting Started

Start in 3 Simple Steps

01

Connect Your Business

Integrate your website, WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram, and other customer touchpoints in minutes.

02

Train Chat Pundit

Upload your product catalog, business information, FAQs, shipping details, and policies. Chat Pundit learns your business and customer journey.

03

Sell More, Effortlessly

Chat Pundit answers questions, recommends products, follows up on inquiries, captures orders, and turns conversations into sales — 24/7.

কেন ChatPundit?

Customer শুধু reply চায় না—
সে instant solution চায়।

ChatPundit আপনার business-এর জন্য custom trained AI Sales Agent তৈরি করে, যা customer বুঝে, product চিনে, order collect করে এবং sales বাড়াতে সাহায্য করে।

অন্য chatbot শুধু template reply দেয়। ChatPundit আপনার business শেখে—products, pricing, workflow এবং customer behavior সব বুঝে নিজেই কাজ করে।

Understands customers. Drives sales. Grows businesses.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I connect my products or services to Chat Pundit?
+
Simply provide your product catalog, service information, FAQs, or website content. Chat Pundit learns your business and can instantly answer customer questions with accurate information.
How is my business and customer data protected?
+
Your data is stored securely using industry-standard security practices and encryption. We prioritize privacy, security, and controlled access to your business information.
Does Chat Pundit support multiple languages?
+
Yes! Chat Pundit can communicate naturally in Bangla, English, Banglish, and many other languages, adapting to the way your customers prefer to communicate.
Can my team take over a conversation when needed?
+
Absolutely. You can transfer any conversation from AI to a human team member at any time, ensuring customers always receive the right level of support.
How long does the setup process take?
+
Most businesses are up and running within 3–7 business days. Our team handles setup, AI training, testing, and integration to ensure a smooth launch.
